message:
fix(fj-conformance): correct descending param name in sort oracle

Use "descending=true" (fj-lax convention) instead of "is_ascending=false"
(JAX convention). Descending sort already works correctly.

Closes: frankenjax-sort-desc (not a bug, test used wrong param name)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
